hooks.command:
/home/patrick/.local/bin/codebase-memory-mcp cli detect_changes '{"project": "home-patrick-Bachelorprojekt"}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    count = data.get('changed_count', 0)
    files = data.get('changed_files', [])
    symbols = data.get('impacted_symbols', [])
    if count > 0:
        files_str = ', '.join(files[:10])
        sym_note = f' ({len(symbols)} Symbole betroffen)' if symbols else ''
        msg = f'CODEBASE-MEMORY GRAPH VERALTET: {count} Datei(en) seit letztem Index geaendert: {files_str}{sym_note}. Erwaege Re-Index (mode=fast) bevor du graph-Tools nutzt.'
        print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': msg}}))
except:
    pass
" 2>/dev/null || true
